summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Personal AI Development Studio with 6 specialized agents (COMMANDER, ATLAS, FORGE, SENTINEL, PROBE, PRISM). All core functionality including AI chat, project management, code editor, and Kanban task board working excellently with fal.ai integration.
passed_tests: Backend API connectivity - 100% success rate (30/30 tests)
All 6 specialized agents initialized correctly (COMMANDER, ATLAS, FORGE, SENTINEL, PROBE, PRISM)
fal.ai AI integration working with real-time responses from agents
Landing page loads with 6 agent cards and workflow explanation
Dashboard navigation via Launch Studio button
Dashboard shows 6 agents with status indicators and availability badges
Project creation with type selection (Unreal, Unity, Godot, web, mobile)
Engine version selection for game projects
Project workspace opens with Chat and Tasks tabs
Monaco code editor with file tree on right panel
AI chat integration - COMMANDER agent responds with detailed content
Agent selection pills working for all 6 agents
Real-time AI response indicators ('COMMANDER is thinking...')
Kanban task board with BACKLOG, TODO, IN PROGRESS, REVIEW columns
Task creation functionality
Project export button available
Code auto-save from chat responses functionality
File management system with version control
Message persistence across sessions
Project deletion and cleanup
Error handling for invalid inputs
All navigation flows between pages working correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (30/30 tests), Frontend: 100% (all core features working)
